title: Tiny Prophecy Website
description: A website design project for the products I have been creating in ceramics class. It includes working forms.

title: How much? | Guess
description: A multiplayer guessing game where players try to guess the price of real Etsy items. Built with PeerJS for real-time communication.
alt: Chat tool with PeerJS project preview

title: Chat tool with PeerJS
description: A chat tool built with PeerJS for real-time communication. I built this project to practice working with WebRTC and PeerJS.
alt: Chat tool with PeerJS project preview

title: Choose A Hero
description: A name generator for choosing a hero for your next adventure. One of my firsts projects using JSON and JavaScript to create a fun interactive experience.

title: URL sortener
description: A URL shortener that uses the is.gd API to generate short links. I built this project to practice working with APIs

title: Missfortune Market
description: This was a Junior challenge from FrontEnd Mentor to design a store landing page. I added my own products.

title: Ride the bus
description: A card game where you must guess the next card correctly to avoid 'riding the bus' and losing the game.

title: Moody Magic 8 Ball
description: It is not in the mood to answer your questions. You can ask anyway.

title: Doodle Pad
description: A doodle pad with three brush sizes, a fill tool, and an eraser.

title: Meta Tags Generator
description: Generate meta tags to improve how your website looks when it is shared on social platforms.

title: Drum Kit
description: Seven buttons tied to drum sounds, with matching keyboard controls.

title: Dice Game
description: Decide who wins by rolling two dice. A fun way of practicing conditional logic.

title: Animal Names Bingo
description: A bingo game that swaps numbers for overly dramatic animal names.

title: Mystic Oracle
description: A playful oracle that offers a glimpse into your future and your lucky numbers.

title: Name Picker | Tattoo
description: Replaces the tattoo on Buddy's chest with the chosen name.

title: Name Picker | Gulf of...?
description: Replaces the word 'Mexico' on the map with the chosen name.

title: Name Picker | News Report
description: Displays the chosen name in a playful breaking-news style message.

title: Name a LOTR Character
description: Checks whether the typed name exists in the Lord of the Rings character array.
alt: Lord of the Rings character checker preview

title: Leap Year Calculator
description: A conditional-logic exercise focused on leap-year rules and comparisons.

title: BMI Calculator
description: A JavaScript exercise exploring outputs and return values.

title: Love Calculator
description: A project built to learn random number generation in JavaScript.

title: Drug Lords / Game UI
description: Designed in Canva first, then built out as a functional site.

title: Tinder for Dogs
description: A bootcamp Bootstrap challenge to recreate a fun landing page.

title: Catflix
description: A Bootstrap practice project inspired by Netflix's layout and feel.

title: Personal Website
description: Designed in Canva and then translated into a working personal site.

title: Flexbox Exercise
description: A responsive pricing-table exercise built while learning Flexbox.

title: Fast Typer
description: A one-minute typing game where speed and accuracy both matter.

title: Memory Game
description: A pixel-art memory game with multiple difficulty levels.
